ticket.subject: RE: Ultraseat PluginHive Demo
ticket.description:
This is a follow-up to your previous request #379306 "Re: Ultraseat PluginHive Demo"

Hello, we’re trying to register the FedEx account via your plugin and getting this error. Please help:

 

 

Regards,


Kelly Grainger
Guy in Charge of Everything

CreoLogic Web Site Design Inc

Suite 3400 Manulife Place
10180 - 101 Street
Edmonton, AB
T5J 3S4

Phone: 780-628-6826

 

We love getting feedback! If you received 5-star service from me, please leave a review (https://creologic.ca/review/) .

**Priyanka Mukhia** (PluginHive)

Mar 20, 2026, 14:05 GMT+5:30

Hi Natasha,

Manohar is currently not available. I’m glad to hear that.

Please feel free to reach out anytime if you need any assistance—we’ll be happy to help.

Wishing you all the best with everything!

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive



![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/images/2016/default-avatar-80.png)

**Natasha Scott**

Mar 20, 2026, 05:53 GMT+5:30

Hi Manohar,



Kelly and his team are confident they’ve got this sorted out. We’ll reach out if something does come up that we need assistance with.



Thanks!



Best regards,



**Natasha Scott** | Controller

nscott@ultraseat.com| 780.962.0411

![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/aPKtH0L3j96chV47HmPA3n8cw/?name=image001.jpg)

![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/DTSZWHvcxkzisJ9oprt3n02v3/?name=image002.jpg)





![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/system/photos/9996081007001/PHOTO.jpeg)

**Manohar V** (PluginHive)

Mar 17, 2026, 22:03 GMT+5:30

Hello Natasha,

Thank you for your reply and for sharing the details.

I tried calling you at 7809620411, but the call was not connected.

The WooCommerce Shipping Services plugin is an advanced solution that allows you to display FedEx calculated shipping rates and also provides the option to add a markup if required.

I would be happy to schedule a demo call and assist you with the plugin setup to meet your requirements. Please let me know your availability and time zone, and we will schedule the call accordingly. Alternatively, you can use the appointment link [CLICK HERE] to book a time based on your availability.

Looking forward to speaking with you.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive



![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/images/2016/default-avatar-80.png)

**Natasha Scott**

Mar 17, 2026, 20:17 GMT+5:30

Good morning,



Good morning,



We would like to display FedEx shipping rates with a calculated markup (15% increase) to compensate for accessorial charges that are not usually included in the FedEx rates provided.



At some point in the future, we may be interested in other features/options, but they aren’t required for our current project scope.





Best regards,



**Natasha Scott** | Controller

nscott@ultraseat.com| 780.962.0411

![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/M2jqWdB6WLqdUQcRT9CoId00f/?name=image001.jpg)

![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/X2LdVSqG8f5x3fPIYV1GYNeLd/?name=image002.jpg)





![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/images/2016/default-avatar-80.png)

**Abhilash**

Mar 17, 2026, 18:07 GMT+5:30

Hi Georgi,

Thanks for the introduction.



Hi Natasha and Kelly,

Great to connect with you both. From my understanding, your current requirement is to display FedEx shipping rates at checkout without generating or printing shipping labels.



Could you please confirm if this is correct, or let me know if there are any additional requirements?



Looking forward to your confirmation.



Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn

comments.body:
Hello Kelly,

Good day!

The FedEx account registration is failing means the details provided while registering the account are not matching the details available on FedEx.

So, could you please check for the correct and valid details available in the FedEx portal and add them in the plugin and try registering the account?

You can also share the below mentioned details with us, so we can try adding the account from our end.

1)Account Name
2)Account Number
3)First Name
4)Last Name
5)Company Name
6)Phone Number
7)E-mail
8)Street
9)City
10)Zip Code
11)State
12)Country
13) A Recent FedEx Invoice

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
